source: The Forever Winter shipping game files (build 24097213) — ItemDetailsData + ValueV2_AMMO + FW/Weapons/Weapon_V2/DT_CaliberToHeadshotMulti, decoded with CUE4Parse
note: Every ammunition type in the game, merged from the item, value and headshot tables. Headshot damage is a per-caliber multiplier that lives on the AMMO, not the gun (1.5x baseline). Value/XP are the sell price and extraction experience per unit.

categories.label: Pistol & PDW
categories.note: Sidearm and personal-defence rounds — cheap, light, plentiful.

categories.label: Intermediate rifle
categories.note: The assault-rifle staples. Surplus is a cheap, bulky, weaker AK feed; Cryo can stun.

categories.label: Shotgun
categories.note: Buckshot for every shotgun. Heavy headshot penalty — aim centre-mass.

categories.label: Battle rifle / DMR
categories.note: Full-power rounds for marksman rifles and GPMGs.

categories.label: Heavy / anti-materiel
categories.note: Big, heavy, expensive rounds for the hardest-hitting weapons.

categories.label: Explosive
categories.note: Launcher payloads — area damage, no headshot bonus.

categories.label: Grenades & throwables
categories.note: Tactical throwables. Utility over damage — smoke, decoy, scan, scramble.

ammo.name: 9x19mm
ammo.desc: Ammunition for the PPSH-41, Viper, C96, PM-9, APC9 Pro, PP-19, and 87 Target.

ammo.name: 5.45x39mm

ammo.name: 5.45x39mm Surplus
ammo.desc: Crude ammo for the AK, TKB-0146, and surplus rifle. Bulky and awkward to carry.

ammo.name: 5.45x39mm Cryo
ammo.desc: Cryogenic ammo for the AK, TKB-0146, and surplus rifle. Can stun enemies.

ammo.name: 7.62x39mm
ammo.desc: Ammunition for the RPK and RPD.

ammo.name: 12-Gauge Buckshot
ammo.desc: Buckshot shells compatible with all shotgun weaponry.
Ammunition for the MG34, SA58, M60 and R11.
